name: Easy Chicken & Pasta
recipeIngredient: 1 pound ground chicken breast, skinless, cooked
1/2 cup red and green bell peppers, chopped
10.75 ounces low-fat cream of mushroom soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, heat olive oil over low heat.
2. Add chicken, onions, and bell peppers. Cook until the chicken is no longer pink and the vegetables are tender.
3. Stir in cream of mushroom soup, water, cooked pasta, and frozen mixed vegetables. Cover and cook over low heat for 5 minutes.
